title: Multi-task Learning
summary: Learning to perform multiple tasks simultaneously, often with shared representations. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Simultaneous Learning. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Multi-Task Meta-Learning and Multi-Task Meta-Learning Techniques.
